description: Build an ICAO Annex 19 four-pillar Safety Management System (SMS) manual — Safety Policy & Objectives, Safety Risk Management, Safety Assurance, Safety Promotion — scoped to a named aircraft operator, airport, or approved maintenance/training organisation, plus the SPI/SPT framework and just-culture policy it frames. Use this skill to build or review an aviation SMS manual, align an SMS to a State Safety Programme (the DGCA SSP in India), or structure an SMS-acceptance submission. Grounds every pillar in KB-STD-ICAO-ANNEX19, aligns the India layer to KB-REG-IN-DGCA, names the Accountable Manager and Safety Manager, forces operator/operation specificity, and ranks every risk mitigation through the hierarchy of controls. Decision-support only; a competent person (aviation SME) must review the output.
name: aviation-sms-builder
